title: New fields in lineage system table entity metadata
body: The `entity_metadata` struct in the `system.access.table_lineage` and `system.access.column_lineage` system tables now includes `genie_space_id` and `alert_id` fields. The `genie_space_id` field is populated when the lineage record originates from a [Genie space](/aws/en/genie) querying data, and `alert_id` is populated when the lineage record originates from an [alert query](/aws/en/sql/user/alerts). For the full schema, see [Entity metadata reference](/aws/en/admin/system-tables/lineage#metadata).
